series_metadata.series_description: Working papers consisting of notes, working drafts and schedules, and copies of GAAP forms used to support all entries in the agency's closing package for GAAP reporting, including date computations, analysis, justifications, recommended adjustments for GAAP reporting and other related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronically for four fiscal years, then destroy provided all state wide cost allocation program (SWCAP) obligations have been met., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
